message:
fix(ci): remove unsupported web-search tool from update-docs workflow

The copilot engine doesn't support web-search tool, causing workflow
failures. Removed it and recompiled with gh-aw.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,8 +51,7 @@
 #   github:
 #     toolsets: [all]
 #   web-fetch:
-#   web-search:
-#   # By default this workflow allows all bash commands within the confine of Github Actions VM 
+#   # By default this workflow allows all bash commands within the confine of Github Actions VM
 #   bash: [ ":*" ]
 #
 # timeout-minutes: 15

@@ -24,8 +24,7 @@ tools:
   github:
     toolsets: [all]
   web-fetch:
-  web-search:
-  # By default this workflow allows all bash commands within the confine of Github Actions VM 
+  # By default this workflow allows all bash commands within the confine of Github Actions VM
   bash: [ ":*" ]
 
 timeout-minutes: 15
